info.name: AmakaziWatch API v3
info.description:
Kenya's first crowdsourced GBV awareness, reporting and prevention platform.

Set base_url = http://127.0.0.1:8000
After login, paste access token into the access_token variable.
For Intelligence endpoints use X-API-Key header instead of Bearer token.

NEW FEATURES ADDED:
- Safety Timer with Check-in
- Safe Word Alert System  
- Risk Assessment Tool
- Escape Plan Generator
- Document Vault (Encrypted Evidence)
- Peer Support Network
- Legal Rights Bot (Kenyan Law)
- Organization Resource Inventory
- Case Matching AI
- Inter-Org Messaging
- Volunteer Management
- Hotspot Prediction Alerts
- Awareness Campaign Manager
- Virtual Workshops
- Anonymous Tips Line
- County Performance Scorecards

request.description: Starts a safety timer. If not checked in, alerts emergency contacts.
Check in to active safety timer to prevent escalation.
Set a secret code word for emergency situations.
Trigger emergency alert using your safe word.
Generates personalized escape plan with resources.
Immediately redirects to weather site and clears session.
Schedule a fake call as excuse to leave dangerous situation.
Upload evidence (images, videos, documents) - encrypted storage
Ask questions about Kenyan GBV laws

  "title": "16 Days of Activism",
  "message": "Stand against GBV. Know your rights. Call 1195 for help.",

  "scheduled_for": "2024-12-01T08:00:00"
